title: Backend Developer Vacancy at DRDO Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at DRDO Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DRDO Capital India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Lucknow-based team.

About DRDO Capital India:
DRDO Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DRDO Capital India!
